hero.title: News & Insights
hero.subtitle: Expert materials on the transport outsourcing market

articles.title: AI in Fleet Management: 2026 Trends
articles.content:
We are excited to announce the launch of the new version of our predictive risk analysis system. Version 2.0 uses updated machine learning algorithms that process telematics data in real-time with unprecedented accuracy.

Key Improvements:

  • Component failure prediction accuracy up to 92%.
  • Analysis of driving style and its impact on part wear.
  • Integration with major service centers for automatic maintenance scheduling.

The new update can predict vehicle component failures with up to 92% accuracy, 500 km before the malfunction occurs. This is a significant step forward in ensuring the safety and efficiency of corporate fleets.

articles.title: ResursLogistics Expands Presence in Central Asia
articles.content:
ResursLogistics continues its international expansion. Today we officially open our new operational hub in Almaty, Kazakhstan.

This strategic move will allow us to significantly improve the quality of service for our clients in the Central Asian region. The new hub will coordinate cross-border transportation and provide on-the-ground technical support.

"Central Asia is a dynamic market with huge potential in logistics. Our presence here will allow us to introduce global standards in fleet management," states the company leadership.

articles.title: Environmental Standards 2026: The Path to Zero Emission
articles.content:
As part of our commitment to ESG principles, ResursLogistics is introducing a new strategy for transitioning to eco-friendly transport. We are helping our partners integrate electric and hybrid vehicles into their supply chains.

Research shows that using an electric fleet not only reduces your carbon footprint but, when managed correctly, also increases economic efficiency through savings on fuel and maintenance.

We offer full-cycle support: from auditing your current fleet to installing charging infrastructure and training drivers.
